failure: FPMH is used as failures/hour after system aggregation
action: Convert by 1e-6 before system MTBF and reliability.

failure: Allowable-failure search moves in the wrong direction.
observed: Returns 0 for MTBF 500 and T=10000 at 90% confidence
reference: Maximum passing count is 13; count 14 gives bound 496.8201
action: Solve the monotone maximum-passing integer boundary.

failure: More than 20 cut sets silently changes exact to a bound.
action: Use BDD/ZBDD or label the bound as approximate.

failure: Prior steps are not accelerated in cumulative exposure.
action: Sum accelerated exposure for every completed step.

failure: Projection bounds are encoded as a failure plus a suspension.
observed: Likelihood contribution f(upper)*S(lower); two records per unit
reference: Interval contribution F(upper)-F(lower); one uncertain unit
action: Implement true interval censoring or separate uncertainties.
